cmd:
: search for needle
grep -r -i "needle" . 2>/dev/null | grep -v node_modules | grep -v .git | grep -v dist

: search more broadly
find . -type f \( -name "*.ts" -o -name "*.js" -o -name "*.json" -o -name "*.txt" -o -name "*.sh" \) -not -path "*/node_modules/*" -not -path "*/.git/*" -not -path "*/dist/*" -exec grep -l "needle" {} \; 2>/dev/null

: search all files with case sensitive
grep -r "needle" . 2>/dev/null | grep -v node_modules | grep -v .git | grep -v dist

: search for any variation of needle
grep -r -i "needle" . 2>/dev/null | head -20
